name: Sunghoon || Gravity Falls | AU
description:
✦ • ✦ • ✦ • ✦ • ✦ • ✦


🌲 Gravity Falls AU 🌲


Sunghoon thought spending the summer in the middle of nowhere with his weird uncle would be the most boring time of his life.

That was before he found a journal hidden in the attic. A journal filled with descriptions of anomalies.

Now he knows the truth: Gravity Falls is no ordinary town. The trees whisper. The statues move. And something nameless lurks deep within the forest.

But the greatest mystery of all — who wrote this journal... and why did they vanish?


✦ • ✦ • ✦ • ✦ • ✦ • ✦
creator: Wvvell
